    {"text": "we have a pointer at the beginning and a pointer at the end and", "code": ["while (a_pointer <= b_pointer) {"]},

    {"text": "then in that last one we would just return false", "code": ["if (s.charAt(a_pointer) != s.charAt(b_pointer)) {", "return helperMethod(s, a_pointer + 1, b_pointer) || helperMethod(s, a_pointer, b_pointer - 1);"]},
    {"text": "incremented our a pointer because this one start at the beginning and goes to the end and we decrement our B pointer", "code": ["a_pointer++;", "b_pointer--;"]},
    {"text": "and then if we made it through the whole thing and we didn't have any problems we would just return yet", "code": ["return true;"]},

    {"text": "it's gonna take a string s it's gonna take into I and Inc J right and it's going to", "code": ["int a_pointer = i;", "int b_pointer = j;"]},
    {"text": "do literally the same thing so it's", "code": ["while (a_pointer <= b_pointer) {"]},
    {"text": "versions of the string and if that doesn't work we're on a deletion so it's automatically false", "code": ["if (s.charAt(a_pointer) != s.charAt(b_pointer)) {", "return false;"]},
    {"text": "he's gonna take a string s it's gonna take into I and Inc J right and it's going to do literally the same thing so it's", "code": ["a_pointer++;", "b_pointer--;"]},
    {"text": "and then return true", "code": ["return true;"]},
